title: English Thinking
objective: Students will explore english thinking concepts including Reading for Meaning.

steps.content: Let's explore Reading for Meaning! Have you ever wondered about this?
Understand that reading is about making meaning, not just saying words correctly — a text that can be decoded but not understood has not been read
Let's practice together! Simple View of Reading (Gough & Tunmer)
If you reads something aloud correctly but then can't tell you what it was about, do they recognise that reading means understanding — not just saying the words?
You did it! Here's what we explored about Reading for Meaning: Simple View of Reading (Gough & Tunmer) reading comprehension research on comprehension-decoding separation
